start.title: Integration Demo
start.description: Photo Collect can be integrated into any IT infrastructure.
start.optionsIntro: You have three options to start the process:

deeplink.title: Open the Deeplink
deeplink.description: The Deeplink is created in the demo app without an API call. Use the generated link to start the process.

iframe.title: Use the Deeplink inside the iFrame
iframe.description: The Deeplink is created in the demo app without an API call. Use the generated link as the iFrame href. Event messages from the iFrame transmit the process status and iFrame height to the parent window.

api.title: Open the invitation link
api.description: This link comes from POST /invitation. The process created a pending invitation on Photo Collect.

status.waitingIntro: The app polls GET /export until data is ready.
status.waitingProxy: The app polls GET /export through the local proxy until a file is ready.
status.notReady: The export is not ready yet. The app will keep polling for a short time.
status.retryLater: No exported file was found yet.

placeholder.noPhotoAttempt: No data yet. Poll attempt {attempt} of {maxAttempts}...

footer.github: Get the source code on GitHub
